title: UPI OC No 185 B FY 2025 26 Addendum to OC 185A Implementation of higher per transaction limit for specific categories in UPI
text:
NEED

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

NPCI/UPI/2025-26/0C/185B 28" August 2025
To,

All Members in UPI,

Dear Madan/Sir,

Subject: Addendum to OC 185 A — Implementation of higher per transaction limit for specific
categories in UPI

Vide reference to NPCI/UPI/2024-25/0C/185 A dated 24" August 2024, NPCI has increased the per
transaction limits for entities under categories aligned to Tax Payments to 25 lakh. With UPI emerging
as a preferred payment method, there are requirements from the market on extending higher per
transaction limits for additional categories of transactions in UP}.

In view of the above the per transaction limits for the mentioned categories in the Annexure I are
enhanced accordingly along with additional guidelines:

1. The enhanced limits shall be applicable for merchants which are categorised as ‘Verified
Merchant’.

2. Acquiring member banks are required to ensure that such limit shall be provided to the
merchants which are compliant to the NPCI UPI guidelines mentioned in NPCI/UPI/OC-
100/2020-21, NPCI/UPI/OC-163/2022-23, NPCI/UPI/OC-163A/2023-24 and NPCI/UPI/OC-
190/2023-24 wherever applicable.

3. Member banks may continue to be provided the discretion to set their internal limits based on
their internal policy, within the overall ceilings prescribed by NPCI.

4. The per transaction limit for P2P shall continue as per the extant guidelines.

Member, Apps and PSPs take note of the above enhancement, undertake requisite changes and
ensure the compliance with the same by 15" September 2025.

Yours Sincerely,

SD/-
Sourabh Tomar
Head UPI Product

1001A, The Capital, B Wing, 10™ Floor,

Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai 400 O51-

ge T: +9122 40009100 F: +91 22 40009101
